chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 237 of 2020 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For orders on office objection / reply 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 2856/2020 29.11.2023 Jam Zeeshan, advocate for the appellant Mr. Balosh Ahmed Junejo, advocate for respondent Qazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, DAG ----------------------------------- This appeal was filed against an ad-interim order that concerns of securing the rental outstanding. Since injunction application has now disposed of/ dismissed and the appeal is now pending, the appellant’s counsel instructed not to press this appeal which is hereby dismissed as not pressed / withdrawn along with pending application/s. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad/PA
